segments.text: O Lord, do not rebuke me in Your anger, Nor chasten me in Your hot displeasure.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Have mercy on me, O Lord, for I am weak; O Lord, heal me, for my bones are troubled.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My soul also is greatly troubled; But You, O Lord—how long?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Return, O Lord, deliver me! Oh, save me for Your mercies' sake!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For in death there is no remembrance of You; In the grave who will give You thanks?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I am weary with my groaning; All night I make my bed swim; I drench my couch with my tears.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My eye wastes away because of grief; It grows old because of all my enemies.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Depart from me, all you workers of iniquity; For the Lord has heard the voice of my weeping.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord has heard my supplication; The Lord will receive my prayer.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let all my enemies be ashamed and greatly troubled; Let them turn back and be ashamed suddenly.
segments.speaker: David
